hooks.command: FILE_PATH="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.rs ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && cargo clippy --fix --allow-dirty --allow-no-vcs-working-dir -- -A clippy::all -W clippy::correctness 2>&1 | tail -20 || true; fi
CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^(\s*)git\s+push'; then echo '[hook] git push detected. Enforcing core_ai_workflow: ensuring tests pass.' >&2 && cargo test; fi
